title: be going to (do)
desc: 계획된 의도 또는 근거 있는 예측
examples: Hello everybody! It is Sunday morning and I'm going to show you a bit of my Sunday routine.

I slept in but now I'm ready to get my day started. I've already got a cup of coffee because I like to treat myself with a pick me up in the morning. This is going to give me the energy I need to be very productive today. The first thing I like to do in the morning is get organized and ready for the week ahead. So I check my emails, respond to messages, look at my calendar and make sure that I'm organized for everything that's coming up. For a long time I was very old school.
Today I'm going to prep three items. I'll meal prep some wraps, chicken breast and a tofu salad.
I don't normally do this but I'm on camera so I'm going to try to show off a little bit.
Right now I'm pressing the tofu and I'm going to chop some veggies for my tofu salad.

title: will / shall
examples: Today I'm going to prep three items. I'll meal prep some wraps, chicken breast and a tofu salad.
I'll get started first with the wraps. I have been obsessed with lentil wraps lately.

You see how to do this home? Watch and learn. No. Now I'm just heating up a pan. I'll put in a little bit of olive oil. I think the pan is hot enough so I'll just pour some of the mixture into the pan and spread it out using the spatula. The edges are looking good so it's time to flip it.
This will give me three lunches or dinners throughout the week. I usually put tuna or chicken on them to make a burrito or sometimes I even use them for pizza so I'll use this as the pizza crust.
I'm gonna put some dressing in there which will be Greek yogurt and mustard and some seasonings of course.

title: can / could / be able to
examples: I only used paper and pen for my to-do lists but now everything is digital so I use many apps to help me stay organized. I usually use four different apps to stay on track. So first I always have my email open so I can respond to messages. I also use Google Calendar to schedule any meetings or events. Lately I've been using Notion because you can do everything on this app but I mostly use it for content creation and work. Finally I use an app on my phone called MyRoutine. It's basically a to-do list of my daily tasks. I'm a morning person and my brain works better in the morning so I prefer to do these kinds of tasks right away in the morning with my cup of coffee.
I usually just do a few simple items that I can easily grab out of the fridge during the week.

Since I'm already outside I decided to go for a little walk. Usually I try to walk 10,000 steps per day but on the weekends I'm not too strict about it. When I walk I usually listen to music or call my family on the phone. I've worked up in appetite and I'm craving Korean food. So I'm going to treat myself and order some delivery food for dinner. I'm a big fan of Kongguksoo and since it's only seasonal I try to eat it as much as possible in the summer. So I think that's what I'm going to order tonight. I think I deserve a beer tonight. Kimchi, Kongguksoo, mandu, in one beer. Perfect. My food just arrived and I can tell that I was so hungry when I ordered.

This is so much food. Let's unpack some of it. This is the broth for the Kongguksoo. Wow it's so thick and there's the noodles to go with it and I also had to get some dumplings because they just looked so good. Wow they're huge. Look at those dumplings. I can't wait to try one and of course the meal would not be complete without a big side of kimchi. I'm going to pour some soy sauce on the dumplings. This is a bit bigger than I expected. It's not a bad thing though. I don't have an opener so I'm going to attempt to open it up with this food. I've never done this before though. I don't even know how to. Oh it hurts. Done.

title: should (advice)
examples: Then I pour in some water. It's a little bit less water than lentils but I'm very comfortable with this recipe so I don't measure it. I just eyeball it. eyeball it means just guessing the amount by looking at it rather than using a recipe or an exact measurement. So I think this should be okay and then it all goes into the blender. This is my favorite kitchen appliance. I use it almost every day. I add in some seasonings and then I blend. I eyeball this part as well. Nutritional yeast turmeric, a little bit of salt, some Italian herbs, and some black pepper. I basically use whatever spices I have on hand. It looks like baby food. Trust the process. I promise. It's really good.
